description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS The Zero In range of products from STV International provide pest control solutions for a variety of household pests, including bed bugs, ants, flies, wasps, clothes moths, and more. Everything you need to live pest-free. Professional-quality products you can trust. Experts in pest control for over 25 years. Zero In Moth Balls 10 Pack x 2 New generation moth balls for total clothes moth protection Protect stored clothes from clothes moth damage with Zero In Moth Balls. These new generation moth balls effectively kill moths, larvae and eggs in wardrobes, cupboards and drawers without the fumes, unpleasant smells or stains associated with older generation moth balls. Contains transfluthrin. Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs. Up to 3 months protection. For use in drawers, cupboards and wardrobes. No fumes or unpleasant smells. Contains transfluthrin. Product Highlights Long-lasting Treatment Effective control of clothes moths for up to 3 months with no fumes, unpleasant smells or staining. Total Population Control Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs for long lasting protection of stored clothing and fabrics. Protects Clothes in Storage Suitable for treating wardrobes, cupboards and drawers to protect delicate woollens and fabrics from clothes moth damage. All-round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, diffusers, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Product Highlights Long-lasting Treatment Residual effect lasts up to 12 months where treated (when not exposed to direct sunlight). Total Population Control Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs for total reduction of the clothes moth population. Protects Clothes in Storage Spray inside wardrobes, drawers and cupboards. Do not spray directly onto fabrics. All-round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, diffusers, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Understanding Clothes Moths Signs of Clothes Moths Unfortunately the first sure sign of a clothes moth infestation will be damage to natural clothing and fabrics. Particularly if the items affected have been kept in storage.Look out for: Causes of Clothes Moth Clothes moths are attracted to animal hair (wool, cashmere, fur) which provides a rich source of food for their larvae. Dirty/used clothes are usually to blame for initial infestations as moths are drawn to sweat and body oil.Be extra careful when introducing vintage clothing to wardrobes and drawers and ideally wash/dry clean before storing. Treatment & Prevention Larvae cause the damage so it's important to break the cycle. Wash clothing before storage and place Zero In moth repellent products within wardrobes and drawers. Apply Zero In solutions and sprays to the inside of wardrobes and furniture prior to storing fabrics inside and monitor for infestations with pheromone traps.Always read on-pack instructions before use.
